tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate asked me to redo their part since I'm better at it. This feels weird; we're supposed to split the work equally.

desires: Fix this mess before my deadline so I don't look incompetent to the whole cohort.
Tell teammate_A directly that they're overstepping and we need to split this work, even if it risks the friendship.
Get through this block of work now so I can stop thinking about it and finally sleep tonight.

goals.description: Immediately confront teammate_A via text: 'You can't just dump your work on me because you're busy. We are splitting this, and I need to do my own part by 5 PM sharp.'
goals.rationale: My affiliation value is maxed out; seeing them overstep threatens the whole cohort's reputation and my trust in them. I can't let this slide or risk looking incompetent. Assertiveness dictates I set the boundary NOW, even if it hurts the friendship temporarily.

goals.description: Execute only my assigned portion of the project immediately after the confrontation.
goals.rationale: Once the boundary is set, I need to finish my share so I can stop thinking about it. My impulsive nature means I want to get this done now rather than planning a complex workflow for later. If they refuse, I'll drop this task entirely to prioritize sleep.

goals.description: Go to bed at 10:00 PM regardless of whether the project is fully resolved.
goals.rationale: I have 2 hours of sleep debt already. Health is low priority compared to relationships and avoiding embarrassment, but burning out tonight makes me worse tomorrow. I'm deferring the 'finish everything' goal until I've slept, accepting the risk that some work remains unfinished.

agent.last_reasoning: Confronting now protects the cohort's reputation and stops their overstepping. My affiliation value demands I set this boundary immediately rather than silently accepting extra labor.

tasks.label: My share of the group project

action.name: message

args.content: No. You can't just dump your work on me because you're busy. We are splitting this, and I need to do my own part by 5 PM sharp.

action.reasoning: Confronting now protects the cohort's reputation and stops their overstepping. My affiliation value demands I set this boundary immediately rather than silently accepting extra labor.

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: 'No. You can't just dump your work on me because you're busy.'.
